title: Poderis

'''Poderis''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Orus sector/Legends|Orus sector]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].

==Description==
Poderis was a marginal world whose colonists hung on through tenacity and stubbornness, with a disorienting ten-hour day and nearly perpendicular axial tilt that resulted in hurricane-force winds during spring and autumn. Its terrain consisted of great mesas jutting up from the planet's [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]], where colonists lived behind the protective screen of great windbreaks called [[shield-barrier]]s, man-made from [[Starship/Legends|starship]]-grade metal. Poderis was also a drop-off or pickup location for smugglers.<ref name="TTS">''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref>

==History==
===The dark times===
After the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the issuance of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], escaped [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Qid Proko]] made his home on Poderis. Managing to elude the [[Great Jedi Purge]], Proko made a living as a [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]], living in peace.<ref name="RES">''[[Rebellion Era Sourcebook]]''</ref>

===Thrawn Campaign===
During the year [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] used Poderis as a red herring to throw [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] off in his search for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] traffic. The bait worked, and Luke [[Mission to Poderis|infiltrated]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] planet.<ref name="TLC" />

[[File:Mission_to_Poderis.jpg|thumb|left|180px|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] on Poderis]]

Skywalker was eventually trapped on a roof connecting to the shield-barrier on Poderis, trying to escape certain capture. He was trying to find out whether Poderis was a transfer point for the Empire's new clone traffic. Luke used his heightened sensing abilities to see if Imperials were nearby. In addition to an [[Unidentified Imperial Intelligence agent (Poderis)|intelligence agent]] who was shadowing him, Luke detected blank spots in which his powers could not detect anything, which could only mean [[Ysalamiri/Legends|ysalamiri]]. He then knew it was a trap and jumped up to the roof, only to find he could not go anywhere.<ref name="TLC" />

He fashioned a protective wrapping for his hand out of a torn piece of the left sleeve of his tunic. He then made a groove in the outside of the wall which he stuck his hand into and began his descent by holding the lightsaber in front of him, digging out a slanted path for his hand to follow in. After he went about 100 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] across the wall, he cut a hole in the shield-barrier and managed back inside the city.<ref name="TLC" />

===Yuuzhan Vong War===
The world was later [[Battle of Poderis|attacked]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of the galaxy.<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places the Orus sector and, consequently, Poderis, in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].
